CANATELLA REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT A COURT REPORTER WAS RETAINED BY DEFENDANT AND IS ON HIS WAY TO THE COURT. THE COURT PASSED ON THIS MATTER TO ALLOW TIME FOR THE COURT REPORTER TO BE PRESENT. THE CASE WAS RECALLED AT APPROXIMATELY 11:15 AM AND COUNSEL CANATELLA INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE RECEIVED NOTICE THAT THE COURT REPORTER WILL BE PRESENT IN 20 MINUTES. RECESS WAS TAKEN AND THIS CASE WAS RECALLED AT 11:56 AM. COUNSEL FOR ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT BUT THE COURT REPORTER STILL HAD NOT ARRIVED. AFTER THE COURT WAITED FOR 2 1/2 HOURS, THIS MATTER PROCEEDED WITHOUT THE PRESENCE OF THE COURT REPORTER. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO DETERMINE SERVICE BY MAIL DATE FOR ORDER EXCLUDING THE HONORABLE JAMES MCBRIDE FROM PARTICIPATING IN THE CASE WAS DENIED DUE TO JUDGE MCBRIDE HAVING PREVIOUSLY RULED ON THIS MOTION. THIS CASE IS ON THE MASTER JURY CALENDAR ON 1/10/11 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR TRIAL ASSIGNMENT. ATTORNEY MR. CANATELLA REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT A COURT REPORTER WAS RETAINED BY DEFENDANT AND IS ON HIS WAY TO THE COURT. THE COURT PASSED ON THIS MATTER TO ALLOW TIME FOR THE COURT REPORTER TO BE PRESENT. THE CASE WAS RECALLED AT APPROXIMATELY 11:15 AM AND COUNSEL CANATELLA INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE RECEIVED NOTICE THAT THE COURT REPORTER WILL BE PRESENT IN 20 MINUTES. RECESS WAS TAKEN AND THIS CASE WAS RECALLED AT 11:56 AM. COUNSEL FOR ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT BUT THE COURT REPORTER STILL HAD NOT ARRIVED. AFTER THE COURT WAITED FOR 2 1/2 HOURS, THIS MATTER PROCEEDED WITHOUT THE PRESENCE OF THE COURT REPORTER. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO DETERMINE SERVICE BY MAIL DATE FOR ORDER EXCLUDING THE HONORABLE JAMES MCBRIDE FROM PARTICIPATING IN THE CASE WAS DENIED DUE TO JUDGE MCBRIDE HAVING PREVIOUSLY RULED ON THIS MOTION. NO COURT REPORTER ARRIVED PRIOR TO THE COURT'S LUNCH RECESS AT 12:15 PM. THERE BEING NO STAY ON THIS MATTER, THE COURT ASSIGNED THIS CASE TO JUDGE MARLA MILLER AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 604 FOR TRIAL. TIME ESTIMATE: 2 WEEKS. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; Clerk: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
